blogs.title: Monolith vs Microservices
blogs.description: A comprehensive comparison of monolithic and microservices architectures, covering when to use each, migration strategies, DDD bounded contexts, and operational complexity
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Event Sourcing Pattern
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to event sourcing covering event stores, event replay, snapshots, CQRS integration, event versioning, and practical Java implementations
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: CQRS Pattern
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to the Command Query Responsibility Segregation pattern in system design, covering read/write separation, event sourcing, and implementation for high-performance applications
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Bulkhead & Retry Patterns
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to bulkhead isolation and retry patterns for building resilient microservices using Resilience4j, thread pool isolation, exponential backoff, and timeout patterns
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Saga Pattern
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to the saga pattern for distributed transactions, covering choreography vs orchestration, compensating transactions, and failure handling
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Circuit Breaker Pattern
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to the circuit breaker pattern in system design, covering failure handling, resilience strategies, and implementation for distributed systems
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Rate Limiting
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to rate limiting in system design, covering token bucket algorithms, distributed rate limiting, and implementation strategies for API protection
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
